series_metadata.series_description: The Board Meeting minutes, as well as documents pertaining to Board Meetings and related exhibits, including the agenda, administrative hearing report and recommendations, the Administrative Action Report, and other information provided to the Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for two years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose if not transferred. ; Paper: Retain until electronic version of documents are created and stored., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
